channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Labour approves Andy Burnham as potential by-election candidate
item.description: Labour approves Andy Burnham as potential by-election candidate

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows
item.description: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows

item.title: FT UK Politics: Gilts fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
item.description: Gilts fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer

item.title: BBC Politics: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?
item.description: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour’s NEC opens door for Burnham to return to Westminster via Makerfield byelection – UK politics live
item.description: Labour’s NEC opens door for Burnham to return to Westminster via Makerfield byelection – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Mandelson papers being withheld, says intelligence watchdog
item.description: Mandelson papers being withheld, says intelligence watchdog

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham cleared to stand in Makerfield by-election paving way for leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Burnham cleared to stand in Makerfield by-election paving way for leadership challenge

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament
item.description: Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament

item.title: LabourList: Labour Party officers approve Burnham bid to stand as candidate in Makerfield by-election
item.description: Labour Party officers approve Burnham bid to stand as candidate in Makerfield by-election

item.title: BBC Politics: Kettering MP resigns from Department of Health job
item.description: Kettering MP resigns from Department of Health job
